name: baseline_rectangular_composite_wingbox
description: Simplified closed rectangular wingbox model for preliminary EI, GJ, and bend-twist coupling trends.
notes: This is a first-order wingbox stiffness model, not a certification-grade section solver.
All panels initially use the same laminate from the layup sweep.
Top/bottom skins dominate bending EI; closed box geometry dominates torsional GJ.
D16/D11 is used as a preliminary laminate-level bend-twist indicator until a full anisotropic wingbox stiffness extraction is added.
